<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Gets customer home profile for given customer and site."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/Customer/{customerId}/{customerSiteId}/homeprofile"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves home profile information for a customer site.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"customerId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"name":"customerSiteId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer Site ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success. Returns home profile.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"customerId":{"type":"integer","example":699493},"customerSiteId":{"type":"integer","example":799644},"hasCompletedProfile":{"type":"boolean","example":true},"metrics":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Metric name","example":"HomeType"},"value":{"type":"integer","description":"Numeric value representing the selection or count","example":1},"stringValue":{"type":"string","description":"Text representation of the value","example":"Single-family Detached"},"count":{"type":"integer","nullable":true}},"title":"HomeProfileMetric"}},"unverifiedMetrics":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object"}},"unverifiedMetricsRaw":{"type":"object","nullable":true}},"title":"HomeProfileResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad request."},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized."},"404":{"description":"Not found."}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
